data.name: Brass's Bounty
data.oracle_text: For each land you control, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
data.flavor_text:
"Why squabble for trinkets when we could be living large off all this gold?"
—Admiral Beckett Brass

data.name: Burnished Hart
data.oracle_text: {3}, Sacrifice this creature: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: Forged by divine hands to wander mortal realms.

data.name: Carnelian Orb of Dragonkind
data.oracle_text: {T}: Add {R}. If that mana is spent on a Dragon creature spell, it gains haste until end of turn.
data.flavor_text: Sages whisper that Lathliss still keeps the heart of the old dragon queen sealed within a jewel, its smoldering warmth an eternal reminder that no monarch is untouchable.

data.name: Chandra, Flameshaper
data.oracle_text:
+2: Add {R}{R}{R}. Exile the top three cards of your library. Choose one. You may play that card this turn.
+1: Create a token that's a copy of target creature you control, except it has haste and "At the beginning of the end step, sacrifice this token."
−4: Chandra deals 8 damage divided as you choose among any number of target creatures and/or planeswalkers.

data.name: Circuitous Route
data.oracle_text: Search your library for up to two basic land cards and/or Gate cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text:
"The shortest path between two points is not always the safest."
—Tamina, district guide

data.name: Confiscate
data.oracle_text:
Enchant permanent
You control enchanted permanent.
data.flavor_text: "But I brought enough for the whole class!"

data.name: Corsair Captain
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
Other Pirates you control get +1/+1.
data.flavor_text: "Lungs full of sea air and a hold full of loot. Ah, what a life!"

data.name: Cultivator's Caravan
data.oracle_text:
{T}: Add one mana of any color.
Crew 3 (Tap any number of creatures you control with total power 3 or more: This Vehicle becomes an artifact creature until end of turn.)

data.name: Demolition Field
data.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this land: Destroy target nonbasic land an opponent controls. That land's controller may search their library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. You may search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

data.name: Druid of the Cowl
data.oracle_text: {T}: Add {G}.
data.flavor_text: "The wild tangle of the Cowl provides sanctuary to life that watched the first buildings rise."

data.name: Elvish Archdruid
data.oracle_text:
Other Elf creatures you control get +1/+1.
{T}: Add {G} for each Elf you control.
data.flavor_text: He knows the name of every elf born in the last four centuries. More importantly, they all know his.

data.name: Evolving Wilds
data.oracle_text: {T}, Sacrifice this land: Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: The land is ever resilient. Should it die, it will be reborn.

data.name: Fake Your Own Death
data.oracle_text: Until end of turn, target creature gets +2/+0 and gains "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control and you create a Treasure token." (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

data.name: Genesis Wave
data.oracle_text: Reveal the top X cards of your library. You may put any number of permanent cards with mana value X or less from among them onto the battlefield. Then put all cards revealed this way that weren't put onto the battlefield into your graveyard.

data.name: Giada, Font of Hope
data.oracle_text:
Flying, vigilance
Each other Angel you control enters with an additional +1/+1 counter on it for each Angel you already control.
{T}: Add {W}. Spend this mana only to cast an Angel spell.
data.flavor_text: Now she is New Capenna's greatest hope.

data.name: Gilded Lotus
data.oracle_text: {T}: Add three mana of any one color.
data.flavor_text: Over such beauty, wars are fought. With such power, wars are won.

data.name: Gleaming Barrier
data.oracle_text:
Defender
When this creature dies, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
data.flavor_text:
"Gold without freedom might as well be lead."
—Angrath

data.name: Goldvein Pick
data.oracle_text:
Equipped creature gets +1/+1.
Whenever equipped creature deals combat damage to a player, create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
Equip {1} ({1}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

data.name: Grow from the Ashes
data.oracle_text:
Kicker {2} (You may pay an additional {2} as you cast this spell.)
Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. If this spell was kicked, instead search your library for two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

data.name: Hedron Archive
data.oracle_text:
{T}: Add {C}{C}.
{2}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Draw two cards.
data.flavor_text:
"You've begun to understand the hedrons' true purpose," said Ugin. "The Eldrazi can be imprisoned."
"And how did that work out last time?" asked Jace.

data.name: Heraldic Banner
data.oracle_text:
As this artifact enters, choose a color.
Creatures you control of the chosen color get +1/+0.
{T}: Add one mana of the chosen color.

data.name: Imprisoned in the Moon
data.oracle_text:
Enchant creature, land, or planeswalker
Enchanted permanent is a colorless land with "{T}: Add {C}" and loses all other card types and abilities.
data.flavor_text: Only one vault was great enough to hold Emrakul.

data.name: Involuntary Employment
data.oracle_text: Gain control of target creature until end of turn. Untap that creature. It gains haste until end of turn. Create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

data.name: Llanowar Elves
data.oracle_text: {T}: Add {G}.
data.flavor_text: The elves of the Llanowar forest have defended it for generations. It is their sacred duty to keep outside influences from corrupting their ancestral home.

data.name: Loot, Exuberant Explorer
data.oracle_text:
You may play an additional land on each of your turns.
{4}{G}{G}, {T}: Look at the top six cards of your library. You may reveal a creature card with mana value less than or equal to the number of lands you control from among them and put it onto the battlefield. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.

data.name: New Horizons
data.oracle_text:
Enchant land
When this Aura enters, put a +1/+1 counter on target creature you control.
Enchanted land has "{T}: Add two mana of any one color."

data.name: Ordeal of Nylea
data.oracle_text:
Enchant creature
Whenever enchanted creature attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it. Then if it has three or more +1/+1 counters on it, sacrifice this Aura.
When you sacrifice this Aura, search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.

data.name: Pyromancer's Goggles
data.oracle_text: {T}: Add {R}. When that mana is spent to cast a red instant or sorcery spell, copy that spell and you may choose new targets for the copy.
data.flavor_text: Chandra treasures her mentor's goggles, not for their magical properties, but for the memory of the woman who taught her to truly harness the power of fire.

data.name: Ramos, Dragon Engine
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever you cast a spell, put a +1/+1 counter on Ramos for each of that spell's colors.
Remove five +1/+1 counters from Ramos: Add {W}{W}{U}{U}{B}{B}{R}{R}{G}{G}. Activate only once each turn.

data.name: Rapacious Dragon
data.oracle_text:
Flying
When this creature enters, create two Treasure tokens. (They're artifacts with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
data.flavor_text:
"Surely it won't notice if I take—"
—Theria the Sly, last words

data.name: Ruby, Daring Tracker
data.oracle_text:
Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)
Whenever Ruby attacks while you control a creature with power 4 or greater, Ruby gets +2/+2 until end of turn.
{T}: Add {R} or {G}.
data.flavor_text: Neither the sharpest thorns nor the foulest beasts would stop her from finding her brother.

data.name: Savage Ventmaw
data.oracle_text:
Flying
Whenever this creature attacks, add {R}{R}{R}{G}{G}{G}. Until end of turn, you don't lose this mana as steps and phases end.

data.name: Seize the Spoils
data.oracle_text:
As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card.
Draw two cards and create a Treasure token. (It's an artifact with "{T}, Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")
data.flavor_text: Slibbo was tired of following Korvold's draconian library rules.

data.name: Solemn Simulacrum
data.oracle_text:
When this creature enters, you may search your library for a basic land card, put that card onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
When this creature dies, you may draw a card.

data.name: Springbloom Druid
data.oracle_text: When this creature enters, you may sacrifice a land. If you do, search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
data.flavor_text: "New growth applies a healing poultice to wounds long scabbed over."
